notes: Summarized from known thesis; not fetched for specific numbers or examples.

Third-party auto-doc. Already noted as anti-pattern; skipped as content source.
Would confirm current hosted service status vs 11-month repo staleness. Outstanding check if adoption decision advances.
865 lines — actual HTML->markdown Turndown + GFM logic. Architecture agent inspected at high level; deep walk-through deferred.
PDF handling via pdfjs-dist. Sidebar to core web extraction; not critical for SoNash relevance.
VLM alt-text generation via OpenAI. Imports ImageInterrogationManager from private submodule — partial visibility regardless.
Cloudflare Browser Rendering API fallback. Engine mode x-engine=cf-browser-rendering. Low relevance for SoNash.
Adapted from puppeteer-extra-plugin-stealth. Third-party-derived; not a first-party knowledge source.
@Threaded decorator for worker thread offload. Interesting pattern but not surfaced in candidates; could re-evaluate if worker patterns become relevant to SoNash.
SSE streaming transform for Accept: text/event-stream responses. Noted in README streaming section; implementation details deferred.
stripe ^11.x, axios ^1.3.3, express ^4.19.2, bcrypt ^5.1.0 all stale/CVE-adjacent. Not runnable without access to private submodule deps. Flagged at S3 (F017); deeper audit deferred.
130 open issues — potential signal about unresolved adoption gotchas or active-work areas. Not triaged.
Velocity conclusion was from single last-push timestamp. Tag cadence over lifetime would refine stable-vs-abandoned read.
Pre-1.0 (civkit ^0.9.0-2570394). Provides AsyncService, singleton, timeout utils, DI plumbing. Could be its own repo-analysis target.
Private repo — unreachable from analysis environment. May be referenced by other public Jina repos (DeepSearch, ReaderLM). Not traced.
Referenced as engine mode (x-respond-with=readerlm-v2). Jina LM-powered content cleaner, likely standalone repo worth separate /repo-analysis run if adoption advances.
Small type declaration shims. Low information density; skipped.
CI downloads GeoLite2-City.mmdb + Source Han Sans SC-Regular font at build time. Legal/licensing implications for self-hosters (MaxMind attribution, Adobe font license) — not examined.
